name: Amy Schumer
bio: Amy Schumer is an American stand-up comedian, actress, writer, and producer known for candid, often provocative material about sex, relationships, and womanhood. She created and starred in the Emmy-winning Comedy Central sketch series Inside Amy Schumer and wrote and starred in the film Trainwreck. Her specials span Comedy Central, HBO, and Netflix.

timeline.ev: Comedy Central special Mostly Sex Stuff airs
Wins Emmy for Inside Amy Schumer; Trainwreck released
First Netflix special, The Leather Special, released

accolades: Primetime Emmy for Outstanding Variety Sketch Series (2015)
Peabody Award for Inside Amy Schumer

bits.t: Her Husband's Awful Painting Of Her
